description_long: This butcher shop is a retail display installation featuring a prominent Traeger branding, with a large orange sign overhead and multiple grilling units arranged in the center. The shop is surrounded by shelving units stocked with bags of wood pellets and grilling accessories, and the back wall is lined with additional products and signage. The flooring is a smooth, gray concrete-like surface, and the walls have a rustic, wood-paneled appearance. The shop is open on one side for customer access, with the other sides enclosed by shelving and display walls. The overall design is modern and functional, emphasizing grilling and barbecue products rather than traditional butcher shop meat displays. There are no visible meat products, hooks, or large front windows.
description: A modern, branded butcher shop display with Traeger signage, grilling units, and shelves of wood pellets and accessories, enclosed by rustic wood-paneled walls.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open customer-facing side, Traeger signage, grilling units, and shelves filled with wood pellets and accessories.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelving, stacked products, and the prominent Traeger sign above.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the rustic wood-paneled back wall and the overhead Traeger sign.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the arrangement of grilling units, pellet bags, and the enclosed shelving layout.
attribute_shop_signage: Large orange and white 'TRAEGER' sign is suspended above the shop, with additional orange and white signage on the back wall reading 'GRILL | SMOKE | BAKE | ROAST | BRAISE | BBQ'. The signage uses bold, sans-serif fonts and is highly visible, with a modern, branded style.
